name: @santiagodevrel/arkiv-ethlisbon-skill
description: Claude Code skill that makes you Arkiv-fluent for ETHLisbon. Pairs with the official arkiv-best-practices skill, adds gap-fill gotchas, ETHLisbon starter templates, and Claude Code prompting patterns. One npx command installs both.
author: Santiago Trujillo Z (santiagodevrel)
